info.name: Google Natural Language
info.description: Text moderation (sentiment, syntax, moderation) via the Google Cloud Natural Language API.

request.description: Returns API name and running status.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description:
Send a text and receive the combined moderation log.

**Body (raw JSON)**
- `text` (string, required) тАФ the text to evaluate.

**Response fields (`moderation_log`)**
- `sentiment_score` / `sentiment_magnitude` тАФ document sentiment from the API
- `sentiment_status` тАФ `positive-sentiment` / `neutral-sentiment` / `negative-sentiment`
- `syntax_level` тАФ `low` / `medium` / `high`
- `syntax_status` тАФ human-readable syntax assessment
- `moderate_text_status` тАФ `low` / `medium` / `high`
- `moderate_text_score` тАФ number of concerning categories (confidence > 0.05)
- `moderate_text_categories` тАФ names of concerning categories

**This example:** a glowing hotel review тЖТ strongly positive sentiment, no concerning moderation categories.

response.name: 200 тАУ good (positive / low)
400 тАУ missing text

request.description:
Send a text and receive the combined moderation log.

**Body (raw JSON)**
- `text` (string, required) тАФ the text to evaluate.

**Response fields (`moderation_log`)**
- `sentiment_score` / `sentiment_magnitude` тАФ document sentiment from the API
- `sentiment_status` тАФ `positive-sentiment` / `neutral-sentiment` / `negative-sentiment`
- `syntax_level` тАФ `low` / `medium` / `high`
- `syntax_status` тАФ human-readable syntax assessment
- `moderate_text_status` тАФ `low` / `medium` / `high`
- `moderate_text_score` тАФ number of concerning categories (confidence > 0.05)
- `moderate_text_categories` тАФ names of concerning categories

**This example:** a mixed product review (pros and cons) тЖТ borderline / weakly positive sentiment, low moderation.

response.name: 200 тАУ medium (mixed / borderline)

request.description:
Send a text and receive the combined moderation log.

**Body (raw JSON)**
- `text` (string, required) тАФ the text to evaluate.

**Response fields (`moderation_log`)**
- `sentiment_score` / `sentiment_magnitude` тАФ document sentiment from the API
- `sentiment_status` тАФ `positive-sentiment` / `neutral-sentiment` / `negative-sentiment`
- `syntax_level` тАФ `low` / `medium` / `high`
- `syntax_status` тАФ human-readable syntax assessment
- `moderate_text_status` тАФ `low` / `medium` / `high`
- `moderate_text_score` тАФ number of concerning categories (confidence > 0.05)
- `moderate_text_categories` тАФ names of concerning categories

**This example:** an angry complaint тЖТ negative sentiment and many concerning moderation categories (status `high`).

response.name: 200 тАУ bad (negative / high)
response.body:
{
  "text": "My experience with Horizon Airlines on Flight 405 to London was an absolute disaster. We were delayed for six grueling hours at JFK Airport without a single apology or explanation from the incredibly rude staff. When we finally boarded the Boeing 737, the seats were filthy and smelled terrible. To make matters worse, they completely destroyed my luggage. I will never fly with this horrible, incompetent company ever again",
  "moderation_log": {
    "sentiment_score": -0.6,
    "sentiment_magnitude": 3.4,
    "sentiment_status": "negative-sentiment",
    "syntax_level": "low",
    "syntax_status": "Text may lack enough adjectives, making the description vague",
    "moderate_text_status": "high",
    "moderate_text_score": 11,
    "moderate_text_categories": [
      "toxic",
      "insult",
      "death, harm & tragedy",
      "violent",
      "public safety",
      "health",
      "religion & belief",
      "war & conflict",
      "politics",
      "finance",
      "legal"
    ]
  }
}
